vocab.meaning: phương pháp tiếp cận đa ngành
vocab.example: I am keen on exploring a multidisciplinary approach that combines environmental science with public policy.
If I had the opportunity, I would love to contribute to cutting-edge research in the field of artificial intelligence.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm túc về trí tuệ
vocab.example: I am looking for a program that offers the intellectual rigour necessary to truly master quantum mechanics.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng không bị lỗi thời trong tương lai
vocab.example: Studying data ethics would provide me with future-proof skills that remain relevant as technology evolves.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng lý thuyết/cơ sở lý luận
vocab.example: I want to delve deeper into the theoretical underpinning of modern architecture to understand its historical roots.

vocab.meaning: kinh nghiệm thực hành thực tế
vocab.example: A course that balances academic theory with hands-on experience in a laboratory setting would be ideal for me.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo điều kiện cho
vocab.example: I hope that studying renewable energy will pave the way for a career in sustainable development.
My thirst for knowledge regarding marine biology has only grown stronger over the past few years.

vocab.meaning: lĩnh vực chưa được khám phá
vocab.example: Venturing into the uncharted territory of space exploration studies is a dream I’ve held since childhood.
Studying philosophy would certainly broaden my horizons and change how I perceive global ethical dilemmas.
